agent-readiness.title: AEO
agent-readiness.subtitle: How your site shows up to AI answer engines
agent-readiness.setup.heading: Get started with AEO
agent-readiness.setup.description: Confirm the market we measure you against — we already know your domain, so this only takes a moment.
agent-readiness.setup.stepMarketHint: We probe answer engines with real questions people ask in this category.
agent-readiness.setup.stepStoryHint: In your own words, what do you do? This helps us read the results the way your customers would describe you.
agent-readiness.setup.storyPlaceholder: Tell us about what you think you do…
agent-readiness.setup.stepCompetitorsHin: These are the brands we score Share of Model against. Your domain is added automatically.
agent-readiness.setup.competitorsAuto: We’ll score you against the leading brands in %{topic}.
agent-readiness.setup.competitorsPending: Pick a category to see who we score you against.
agent-readiness.setup.stepTrackHint: Panels run on a shared schedule across these agents, so results are ready fast.
agent-readiness.setup.promptsNote: Next, you'll review the AI-drafted questions we ask — edit them or add your own before we start.
agent-readiness.setup.detecting: Analyzing your site to pre-fill these…
agent-readiness.setup.detected: Pre-filled from your site — adjust anything that looks off.
agent-readiness.prompts.heading: Review the questions we'll ask
agent-readiness.prompts.description: We drafted these from your site and category. Edit, remove, or add your own — up to 10. These are the exact questions we send to the answer engines.
agent-readiness.prompts.synthError: We couldn't draft questions automatically. Add your own below to continue.
agent-readiness.prompts.startError: We couldn't start tracking for this market. Please try again in a moment.
agent-readiness.pending.body: Answer engines are being probed across your category. Share of Model appears as soon as the panel completes — usually within a few minutes.
agent-readiness.panelStarting.heading: Setting up your citation panel
agent-readiness.hero.visibilityTip: The share of answers in this category that cite your site when people ask.
agent-readiness.hero.prominenceTip: When you are cited, how large your share of the cited content is versus everyone else in the answer.
agent-readiness.hero.mentionsTip: How often answer engines name your brand in this category — whether or not they cite you.
agent-readiness.hero.referralsTip: Real visits that answer engines sent to your site in the latest daily window.
agent-readiness.citation.heading: Your citations
agent-readiness.citation.description: How answer engines cite your site when they answer questions in this category — measured first-party, on your own domain.
agent-readiness.citation.gap: Answer engines mention you in %{mentions} of answers but only cite you in %{visibility} — a chance to earn the citation, not just the mention.
agent-readiness.citation.pending: We are probing answer engines with real questions from your category. Your citation metrics appear here as soon as the panel completes — usually within a few minutes.
agent-readiness.citation.running: We're probing answer engines with your questions right now. This usually takes a few minutes — feel free to leave this page and come back. Your citation metrics appear here automatically once the panel finishes.
agent-readiness.referralOps.heading: Referrals by answer engine
agent-readiness.referralOps.empty: No AI referrals in this window yet. They appear here once answer engines start sending you visits.
agent-readiness.som.heading: Share of Model
agent-readiness.som.description: Your share of AI citations versus the competitive set, across the models we probe.
